Title: October 2024
Content: *p78404a0824* do not write in this area    do not write in this area          do not write in this area 8          3  the luminosity l of a main sequence star varies with the mass m of the star.   the relationship between l and m is given by l l m m r                     where  l  is the luminosity of the sun  m  is the mass of the sun  r is a constant.   (a)  explain how a graph of log l against log m m   can be used to determine the  value of r. (2)       (b)  the data for six main sequence stars is given in the table. m m  l / 10 35 w 6.5 31 200 3.2 3040 1.7 235 0.93 30.4 0.78 16.2 0.47 2.43     (i)  plot a graph of log l against log m m   on the grid opposite.       use the additional columns for your processed data.       do not convert the values of l from 10 35 w to w.
